body.para: The CD-ROM is presented as an ATAPI device on the IDE channel -- dqa0.0.0.105.0, "EMULATR VIRTUAL CDROM". ATAPI / IDE scaffolding for the CY82C693 is in active development; the dqa0 enumeration gap (the firmware does not consistently see the device during the option-firmware scan) is a known open item.
The master (CD) ATAPI handshake works end to end:
Alt-status reads 0x50 (DRDY | DSC) -- present and ready, not 0xFF, not 0x00.
The 0xAA scratch write to cyl-low reads back 0xAA -- the presence gate passes.
IDENTIFY DEVICE (0xEC) returns status 0x41 (DRDY | ERR), error 0x04 (ABRT), and cyl bytes 0x14 / 0xEB -- the ATAPI signature is correctly posted on abort.

IDENTIFY PACKET DEVICE (0xA1) runs, then two PACKET (0xA0) commands. A REQUEST SENSE CDB (03 00 00 00 12 00) returns sense key 0x02 (NOT READY) / ASC 0x3A (MEDIUM NOT PRESENT), then status 0x50, phase Complete.
